message:
Fix GoReleaser v2 config: folder -> directory

Move 'folder' inside 'repository' and rename to 'directory' per v2 spec.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -96,7 +96,7 @@ brews:
   - repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
-    folder: Formula
+      directory: Formula
     homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
     description: "Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for dangerous commands"
     license: MIT
